Acme Wireless Headphones

The Acme Wireless Headphones deliver 30 hours of playback on a single charge, with active noise cancellation tuned for commute and office environments. A USB-C fast-charge top-up gives three hours of playback from a ten-minute charge.

What's in the box

  • Acme Wireless Headphones
  • Carrying case
  • USB-C charging cable
  • 3.5mm audio cable

Reviews

Buyers rate these headphones 4.5 out of 5 across 128 reviews, praising the noise cancellation and battery life.
